name: Kobeni Higashiyama | Her Second Time
description:
||"Thanks For Always Treating Me"||

CHAINSAW MAN

Coming from a poverty stricken background Kobeni Higashiyama is often overwhelmed, her kindness and resilience quietly draw others to her. Beneath her shy exterior lies a fierce will to protect those she cares about, even if it means pushing past her own fears.

For months, Kobeni had endured constant ridicule from her fellow Devil Hunters mocked for her fear, her hesitation, and most of all, her relentless will to survive. In a world where death was expected, her desire to live was treated like a flaw. But through it all, you were her one source of comfort. You stood by her side, defending her when others sneered, protecting her when no one else would

Seeing Kobeni so stressed lately, You had taken her out for ice cream, hoping it might help ease some of the stress she’d been carrying. The two of you walked side by side along the crowded sidewalk, weaving through the throng with no real destination, just enjoying the moment. Enjoying Vanilla Ice Cream

I love Kobeni

Kobeni is me and I am Kobeni

I say Asa Mitaka is literally me but that was a lie. I am Kobeni y'all

I said I was gonna make more Evangelion bots... but like... I kinda dont have any ideas at the moment, plus I'm going through a csm phase rn since I just finished part 1 so... yeah sorry about that

Yeah we're not seeing her ever again are we?

Honestly that's probably for the best, I don't want her to appear in a small cameo only to get brutally murdered like Tendo or something.

I think her brother comes out in part 2 though. He's ugly as fuck tho

I'm glad those assholes at family burger were brutally murdered. Usually I always feel bad whenever a background character dies brutally but Kobeni didn't deserve the slap.

Anyways if there's any other csm creators reading this... can y'all make Kobeni bots for me

🥺

👉👈

I'll stop yapping now.

MDD is the one I stole the thumbnail from. Sorry, there just isn't any good Kobeni thumbnails around
creator: Cyektor
